packages.description: The Panch Kedar Yatra is a profound spiritual journey through the majestic Garhwal Himalayas, beginning from the holy city of Haridwar and leading pilgrims into the heart of Lord Shiva’s divine presence. The journey proceeds through Sonprayag and Gaurikund, the sacred gateway to the revered Kedarnath Temple, where Lord Shiva is worshipped in his hump form amid snow-clad peaks.

packages.description: The Panch Kedar Yatra is a profound spiritual journey through the majestic Garhwal Himalayas, beginning from the holy city of Haridwar and leading pilgrims into the heart of Lord Shiva’s divine presence. The journey proceeds through Sonprayag and Gaurikund, the sacred gateway to the revered Kedarnath Temple, where Lord Shiva is worshipped in his hump form amid snow-clad peaks.
priceIncludes: 01 Night accommodation at Nepalgunj on Double/Twin sharing basis (Star Premium)
01 Night accommodation at Simikot on sharing basis (Hotels and Guest house)
01 Night accommodation at Hilsa on sharing basis (Guest house)
05 Night accommodation in Tibet on sharing basis (Hotels and Guest houses)
Nepalgunj - Simikot - Nepalgunj flight cost (16 Pax at a time)
English speaking Tibetan guide for customers formalities
Nepali Supporting Staff (cook, Sherpa & helper) 5:1 basis
Buffet vegetarian meals during Yatra on AP basis (Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner)
Nepali experienced Team Leader/Guide during Yatra
Mansarovar and Kailash Yatra Permit fees
Duffel bag for carrying goods during Yatra
Back pack bag for personal items to carry and Cap
First aid medical kit bag & Oxygen cylinder
Round trip transportation in Tibet AC Luxury coach
Arrival and departure transfer with assistance by A/C Vehicle
All sightseeing and excursions as mentioned in the itinerary
departureAndReturnLocation: Personal expenses and travel Insurance
Medical expenses and Emergency rescue evacuation expenses
Horses, Pony and porter during Kailash Parikrama
Tips for Guide, Porter, driver and personal expenses
Extra Hotel charges in Nepal side if early return from Tibet
Any additional cost due to natural calamities and unforeseen circumstances
Visa splitting charge and extra transportation cost, if returning early from Yatra
5% GST if you pay in India account
ItineraryFrom: ARRIVAL AT LUCKNOW - DRIVE TO NEPALGUNJ(150m)
SIMIKOT - FLY TO HILSA BY HELI - DRIVE TO PURANG(3700 M, 35 KM 1.5 Hrs)
PURANG - MANSAROVAR PARIKRAMA(102 KM 4/5Hrs) BATH, POOJA, HOMA(4550M)
MANSAROVAR-DRIVE TO DARCHEN(4600M,58 KM 2Hrs) - TREK TO DERAPHUK(4860 M, 12KM)
ZURALPHUK -TREK TO DARCHEN(08 KM, 3Hrs) - DRIVE TO HILSA(3500M)
HILSA-FLY TO SIMIKOT BY HELI - FLY TO NEPALKUNJ - DRIVE TO LUCKNOW
